title: Model Repository
documentation:
## Purpose
Identifies which external model repository a model spec resolves against. Currently the only supported value is `huggingface`, which causes the system to resolve model specifications against the HuggingFace Hub API and download infrastructure.

## When to use
Use this type as a parameter when a cap needs to know which registry to query. Most model specs encode the repository in their prefix (e.g. `hf:` for HuggingFace), so this type is primarily useful when the repository must be specified separately from the spec string.

## Notes
The allowed value is `huggingface`. Additional repository types may be added in future; implementations should reject unknown values rather than silently defaulting. See [Model Spec](https://capdag.com/browse/media:model-spec;textable) for the combined spec format.
